title: SJRCraft Optional Modpack S5
description: The official OPTIONAL Modpack to play on the SJRCraft SMP Server. Can also be used as a normal client/sided modpack for use on any server or singleplayer world.
body:
**The official OPTIONAL Modpack to play on the SJRCraft SMP Server.**

**WARNING** > Simple Voice-chat is **ENABLED _by default_**, make sure to disable or remove the mod from the modpack if you do not wish to use it.

Before updating any mod in this modpack, please create a duplicate of the modpack profile, as some mods in this modpack has specific, older versions installed due to issues with the newer versions. NEVER press the "Update all" button.

This modpack includes Proximity Voice-chat as the main focus, as our server is capable of it.

Other mods include optimization, visual effects, QOL Improvements and fun extras

More extreme "fun extras" mods are disabled by default, to enable them all you have to do is find them in the mod list and move the slider until it turns green.

The modpack also includes Replaymod, all you need to do is enable it in the mod list.
